### Postdocs

::: {.grid}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Ethan Epperly"
    url    = "https://ethanepperly.com"
    image  = "/images/ethan-epperly.jpeg"
    affil  = "Professor"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Simon Gabriel"
    url    = "https://gabriel-maths.github.io"
    image  = "/images/simon-gabriel.jpg"
    affil  = "Professor of the Practice of Economics"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Zoe Himwich"
    url    = "https://math.berkeley.edu/~dvv/"
    image  = "/images/zoe-himwich.jpeg"
    affil  = "Professor"
>}}

:::
